who: HR administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month
offer: For HR administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, inaccurate time tracking causes payroll errors. We automate time tracking instead of manual time tracking and payroll calculation.
problem: Inaccurate time tracking leads to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR administrators with demo video
try_it: Let users try manual time entry and overtime calculation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
